Bash(python -u -c "
import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
from docx import Document
import re

doc = Document\('PrankGuard_Plan_Complet_v3.docx'\)

for p in doc.paragraphs:
    text = p.text.strip\(\)
    style_name = p.style.name if p.style else 'None'
    if style_name and 'Heading' in style_name:
        print\(f'[{style_name}] {text}'\)
    elif re.match\(r'^\(1[0-2]|[1-9]\)\\.\\s+[A-ZÀ-Ú]', text\):
        print\(f'[Numbered] {text}'\)
" 2>&1)

import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
from docx import Document

doc = Document\('PrankGuard_Plan_Complet_v3.docx'\)
capture = False
text = []
for p in doc.paragraphs:
    t = p.text.strip\(\)
    if '4.4' in t and 'Trajectory' in t:
        capture = True
    if capture and '4.5' in t and 'Motion' in t:
        break
    if capture:
        text.append\(t\)
print\('\\n'.join\(text\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python -u -c "
import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
from docx import Document

doc = Document\('PrankGuard_Plan_Complet_v3.docx'\)
for i, table in enumerate\(doc.tables\):
    rows = []
    for row in table.rows:
        cells = [cell.text.strip\(\) for cell in row.cells]
        rows.append\(cells\)
    text_all = ' '.join\(str\(r\) for r in rows\)
    if 'throttle' in text_all.lower\(\) or 'CPU global' in text_all or 'descendre' in text_all.lower\(\):
        print\(f'=== Table {i} ==='\)
        for row in rows:
            print\(' | '.join\(row\)\)
        print\(\)
" 2>&1)
